dict.string: Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo shows your upcoming events in the notch tray.
Dynamo peeks due reminders in the notch so you don’t miss them.
Dynamo peeks due reminders in the notch so you don’t miss them.
Dynamo uses your location to show local weather in the notch. Location is sent only to Apple’s WeatherKit service to fetch the forecast; you can also set a location manually in Settings instead.
Dynamo can show a live camera mirror in the notch, including Continuity Camera (iPhone). The camera only runs while you have the Webcam tab open — never in the background.
Dynamo controls Music and Spotify for play/pause, skip, cover art, and playlists in the notch.
